"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir/objects.a
E:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -w -DWIN32 -D_WINDOWS -DFLAC__NO_DLL -DFLAC__STATIC_BUILD -DLIB_ZPLAY_DYNAMIC -DLIB_ZPLAY_EXPORT_WITH_DEF_FILE -g3 -gdwarf-4 -D_DEBUG -O0 -fpermissive -g -shared E:\libzplay_final_merge\out_lite\src_x64\src\libzplay.def -o E:\libzplay_final_merge\out_lite\out\mingw\MSVCRT\x64\debug\-O0\bin\libzplay_d.dll -Wl,--out-implib,E:\libzplay_final_merge\out_lite\out\mingw\MSVCRT\x64\debug\-O0\lib\liblibzplay_d.dll.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir\linkLibs.rsp
